Off Calendar Dec-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: BRIAN MALLOY, ESQ., 415.989.1800, FOR PLAINTIFF YVONNE JANSKY.
MAREN CLOUSE, ESQ., 202.637.5600, FOR DEFENDANTS LABORATORY CORPORATION OF AMERICA AND LABORATORY CORPORATION OF AMERICA HOLDINGS.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTS LABORATORY CORPORATION OF AMERICA and LABORATORY CORPORATION OF AMERICA HOLDINGS' DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained as to causes of action 2 and 3 without leave to amend. Plaintiff does not sufficiently allege actionable misrepresentations and the claims lack the requisite specificity. The Court sustains the demurrer to cause of action 10 without leave to amend. See CCP 1061. The Court sustains the demurrer to cause of action 11 without leave to amend. Plaintiff does not allege outrageous conduct. The Court overrules the demurrers to the remaining causes of action. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges injury/damage, including dimunition of value and benefits under the insurance contract. Plaintiff alleges that defendant concealed information, disrupted her relationship with her insurer, engaged in unfair competition, and engaged in unfair debt collection practices. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
